title: Packle
description: A Texture Pack that basically retextures java to look like bedrock. Also some minor texture changes, Some Old Versions may not contain the full textures.
body:
# Notice

I, Jackie The Coder, quit modding. Because no one thanks me enough or support me to feel like I have made what i should have.

If you wish to have my mods, sorry but you have to support me on patreon or Ko-fi once it's ready.


# Textures
Version 1: Pack.zip:
has only button, slider, slider handle, and checkbox/checkbox selected edited
Version 2: pacl2.zip:
has button varients, and better slider textures, and a previous version
Version 3: packl3.zip:
has every texture, and some previous versions

# What Is This?
This Texture Pack Retextures everything to a bedrock version of it.
This Includes buttons, and other UI elements.

This Texture Pack is meant to make UI to be a bedrock version of it to make it look more, design wise; nice.

If you enjoy the bedrock UI but don't want bedrock's incompatibility; this is perfect!
# Purpose
The whole reason this exists is because I did it one night because I liked bedrock textures and I was doing a item texturing thing with ItemsAdder.
